verdicts.note: Appraiser accreditation establishes a credential, and prior candidacy establishes electoral participation, but the dossier does not document appraisal tenure, office service, or an outsider-renewal case sufficient to place either experience pole.

review_notes: Jenkins's incumbency, seven documented years in the county office, and thirteen earlier appraisal years support the maximal proven-record placement. Moriarty remains qualified by accreditation, but the dossier lacks the duration or institutional record needed for a directional rubric score.
